---
title: "Practicum Interim"
format: html
knitr: 
  opts_chunk: 
    echo: true
    eval: true
---
# Data
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

world <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/US imports from world.csv")
world
```

#World
```{r}
pw <- world %>%
  mutate(total_value = cifvalue/1000000) %>%
  select(refYear, flowDesc, partnerDesc, cmdDesc, total_value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = refYear, y = total_value)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
    title = 'Telecomm - US Imports From World Over Years',
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  )
pw
```

#US DVA Final Demands
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

us_dfd <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/TiVA/us_dfd.csv")
us_dfd


graph <- us_dfd %>%
  select(TIME_PERIOD, OBS_VALUE) %>%
  mutate(
    TIME_PERIOD = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD),
    OBS_VALUE = as.numeric(OBS_VALUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(TIME_PERIOD)

p <- ggplot(graph, aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = OBS_VALUE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#1874CD") +
#  geom_point(size = 2.2, color = "#1874CD") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2000, 2022, by = 5)) +
  labs(
    title = "US Domestic Value Added in Final Demands of Telecommunications",
    subtitle = "World, 2000–2022",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Million USD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
  plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
)


p
```

```{r}
ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure1.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

#tiva oecd+non-oecd US EXPORT
```{r}
us_EXPORT <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/TiVA/US_E.csv")
us_EXPORT

df_sum <- us_EXPORT %>%
  filter(`Exporting area` %in% c("OECD", "Non-OECD economies")) %>%
  group_by(TIME_PERIOD) %>%
  summarise(
    total_value = sum(OBS_VALUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(TIME_PERIOD = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD)) %>%
  arrange(TIME_PERIOD)

plot_us <- ggplot(df_sum, aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = total_value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#1874CD") +
#  geom_point(size = 2.2, color = "#1874CD") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(df_sum$TIME_PERIOD), max(df_sum$TIME_PERIOD), by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = ",")) +
  labs(
    title = "US Value Added in Telecommunications Gross Exports",
    subtitle = "World, 2000–2022",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Million USD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
 theme(
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
  plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
)

plot_us
```


```{r}
ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure2.png", plot = plot_us, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



#indirect Chinese VA
```{r}
C_VA <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/TiVA/indirect Chinese VA.csv")
C_VA

```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

plot_df <- C_VA %>%
  transmute(
    year = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD),
    value_million = as.numeric(OBS_VALUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

# 3. 畫圖
pp <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = value_million)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1874CD", linewidth = 1.2) +
#  geom_point(color = "#1874CD", size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(plot_df$year), max(plot_df$year), by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.08))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Chinese Value Added in U.S. Telecommunications Final Demand",
    subtitle = "2000–2022, China → United States",
    x = "Year",
    y = "US$ Million",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
 theme(
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
  plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
)


pp

# 5. 匯出圖片
ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure3.png", plot = pp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

plot_df <- C_VA %>%
  transmute(
    year = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD),
    value_million = as.numeric(OBS_VALUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    yoy_growth = value_million / lag(value_million) - 1,
    yoy_label = percent(yoy_growth, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

pp1 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = value_million)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1874CD", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#1874CD", size = 2.3) +
  geom_text(
    data = plot_df %>% filter(year %% 5 == 0),
    aes(label = yoy_label),
    vjust = -0.8,
    size = 3,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(plot_df$year), max(plot_df$year), by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.12))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Chinese Value Added in U.S. Telecommunications Final Demand",
    subtitle = "2000–2022, China → United States",
    x = "Year",
    y = "US$ Million",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1)
  )

pp1

ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure3.png", plot = pp1, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



#China
```{r}
china <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/US imports from China.csv")
china
```

```{r}
pc <- china %>%
  mutate(total_value = cifvalue/1000000) %>%
  select(refYear, flowDesc, partnerDesc, cmdDesc, total_value, partnerDesc) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = refYear, y = total_value, color = partnerDesc)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
    color = "Country",
    title = 'Telecomm - US imports from China over years',
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  )
pc
#can look years before 2018
```


```{r}
usmca <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/USMCA.csv")
usmca
```

```{r}
pu <- usmca %>%
  mutate(total_value = cifvalue/1000000) %>%
  select(refYear, flowDesc, partnerDesc, cmdDesc, total_value, partnerDesc) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = refYear, y = total_value, color = partnerDesc)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
    color = "Country",
    title = 'Telecomm - US imports from Canada and Mexico over years',
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  )
pu
```

```{r}
comparison <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/Comparison.csv")
comparison
```

```{r}
pcp <- comparison %>%
  mutate(total_value = cifvalue / 1000000) %>%
  select(refYear, flowDesc, partnerDesc, cmdDesc, total_value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = refYear, y = total_value, color = partnerDesc)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2015, 2023, 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    `IRL` = '#FFDAB9',
    `CHE` = '#7D26CD',
    `Thailand` = "#00247D",
    `DEU` = "#39FF14",
    `China` = "#E63946",
    `Canada` = "#F4A261",
    `India` = "#2A9D8F",
    `ITA` = '#E066FF',
    `DNK` = '#3A5FCD',
    `Mexico` = "#FFB6C1",
    `Japan` = "#6A4C93",
    `Rep. of Korea` = "#E9C46A",
    `Viet Nam` = "#264653",
    `USA` = "#1874CD",
    `EU28` = "#CD9B9B"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
    color = "Country",
    title = "Telecomm - US imports from different countries over years",
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1)
  )

pcp

#pcp <- comparison %>%
#  mutate(total_value = cifvalue/1000000) %>%
#  select(refYear, flowDesc, partnerDesc, cmdDesc, total_value, partnerDesc) %>%
#  ggplot(aes(x = refYear, y = total_value, color = partnerDesc)) +
#  geom_line() +
#  geom_point() +
#  theme_minimal() +
#  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2015, 2023, 1)) +
  # labs(
#     x = "Year",
#     y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
#     color = "Country",
#     title = 'Telecomm - US imports from different countries over years',
#     caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
#   )
# 
# pcp
```

#TiVA all countries
```{r}
all <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/TiVA/all countries.csv")
all

```

```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

top10_countries <- all %>%
  group_by(`Value added origin area`) %>%
  summarise(
    total_value = sum(OBS_VALUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_value)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

df_top10 <- all %>%
  filter(`Value added origin area` %in% top10_countries$`Value added origin area`) %>%
  mutate(
    TIME_PERIOD = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD),
    OBS_VALUE = as.numeric(OBS_VALUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD)

p_top10 <- ggplot(
  df_top10,
  aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = OBS_VALUE, color = `Value added origin area`)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_top10$TIME_PERIOD), max(df_top10$TIME_PERIOD), by = 5)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = ",")) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Countries by Total Value Added",
    subtitle = "Selected by cumulative value across all years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Million USD",
    color = "Country",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1)
  )

p_top10

```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)


df_clean1 <- all %>%
  mutate(
    TIME_PERIOD = as.numeric(TIME_PERIOD),
    OBS_VALUE = as.numeric(OBS_VALUE)
  )

top9 <- df_clean1 %>%
  group_by(`Value added origin area`) %>%
  summarise(total_value = sum(OBS_VALUE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_value)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 9)

top9_names <- top9 %>%
  arrange(desc(total_value)) %>%
  pull(`Value added origin area`)


df_share <- df_clean1 %>%
  group_by(TIME_PERIOD) %>%
  mutate(year_total = sum(OBS_VALUE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(share = OBS_VALUE / year_total)


df_top9 <- df_share %>%
  filter(`Value added origin area` %in% top9_names)

bg_data <- expand.grid(
  facet_country = top9_names,
  country = top9_names,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  left_join(
    df_top9 %>%
      select(
        TIME_PERIOD,
        country = `Value added origin area`,
        share
      ),
    by = "country"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    facet_country = factor(facet_country, levels = top9_names)
  )

fg_data <- df_top9 %>%
  mutate(
    facet_country = factor(`Value added origin area`, levels = top9_names)
  )

ppp <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = bg_data,
    aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = share, group = country),
    color = "grey80",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = fg_data,
    aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = share, color = facet_country),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet_country, ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(df_top9$TIME_PERIOD), max(df_top9$TIME_PERIOD), by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Share of Value Added in US Final Demand - Telecommunications",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Share of Value Added",
    caption = "Source: OECD TiVA Database"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ppp
```

```{r}
ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure4.png", plot = ppp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
Tworld <- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/TiVA/world.csv")
Tworld
```


# US Final Demands From Different Countries Over Years
```{r}
ptw <- Tworld %>% 
  select(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD, OBS_VALUE) %>%
  filter(`Value added origin area` %in% c("Thailand", "India", "Viet Nam", "Korea", "Cambodia", "Japan", 
                                          "Chinese Taipei", "China (People’s Republic of)")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = OBS_VALUE, color = `Value added origin area`)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Value (US$) in Million",
    fill = "Country",
    title = 'Telecomm - US Final Demands From Different Countries Over Years',
    caption = "Source: TiVA"
  )

ptw

```


# TiVA world growth %
```{r}
growth_data <- Tworld %>%
  select(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD, OBS_VALUE) %>%
  filter(`Value added origin area` %in% 
           c("Thailand","India","Viet Nam","Korea", "China (People’s Republic of)",
             "Cambodia","Japan","Chinese Taipei", "World")) %>%
  arrange(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD) %>%
  group_by(`Value added origin area`) %>%
  mutate(
    growth_rate = (OBS_VALUE - lag(OBS_VALUE)) / lag(OBS_VALUE) * 100
  )

growth_plot <- growth_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = growth_rate,
             color = `Value added origin area`)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Growth Rate (%)",
    color = "Value added origin area",
    title = "Growth of Value Added in US Telecom Final Demands",
    caption = "Source: TiVA"
  )

growth_plot
```

# TiVA China growth %
```{r}
china_growth_data <- Tworld %>%
  select(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD, OBS_VALUE) %>%
  filter(`Value added origin area` %in% 
           c("China (People’s Republic of)")) %>%
  arrange(`Value added origin area`, TIME_PERIOD) %>%
  group_by(`Value added origin area`) %>%
  mutate(
    growth_rate = (OBS_VALUE - lag(OBS_VALUE)) / lag(OBS_VALUE) * 100
  )

growth_plot_china <- china_growth_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TIME_PERIOD, y = growth_rate)) +
  geom_line(color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "China Growth Rate (%)",
    title = "China Growth of Value Added in US Telecom Final Demands",
    caption = "Source: TiVA"
  )

growth_plot_china
```

```{r}
new<- read_csv("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/New.csv")
new
```

```{r}
country_year <- comparison %>%
  filter(!partnerDesc %in% c("World", "Other Asia, nes")) %>%
  group_by(refYear, partnerDesc) %>%
  summarise(
    total_value = sum(primaryValue, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
country_year
```


```{r}
top9_each_year <- country_year %>%
  group_by(refYear) %>%
  slice_max(total_value, n = 9)
top9_each_year
```


```{r}
ggplot(top9_data,
       aes(x = refYear, y = total_value/1000000)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ partnerDesc, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2015, 2024, 3)) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Primary Value (US$ in Million)",
    title = "Top 9 Countries of US Telecom Imports (2015–2024)",
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  )

```


#Comtrade US export - World
```{r}
install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

Comtrade_US_World <- read_excel("/Users/nw/Desktop/Practicum/Comtrade/us export world.xlsx")
Comtrade_US_World
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

plot_df <- Comtrade_US_World %>%
  transmute(
    year = as.numeric(refYear),
    export_million = as.numeric(primaryValue) / 1e6
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

p_11 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = export_million)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1874CD", linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = plot_df$year) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_comma(),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.08))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "U.S. Telecommunications Exports to the World",
    subtitle = "UN Comtrade",
    x = "Year",
    y = "US$ Million",
    caption = "Source: UN Comtrade"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1)
  )

p_11


ggsave("/Users/nw/Desktop/figure5.png", plot = p_11, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
